summary: Wave 3 Backend API tests mostly passing (10/11). CRITICAL frontend issue: shipping fee field completely missing from Create Listing page despite code being present in source files. Transactions page also missing Wave 3 features (tabs, status chips). Backend implementation is solid, but frontend Wave 3 features are not deployed/rendered.

minor_issues.issue: Cannot test buy flow with shipping fees using same user (own-listing rejection is correct behavior)
minor_issues.impact: Need second user account or foreign listing to fully test buy flow
minor_issues.note: This is expected behavior, not a bug. The endpoint correctly rejects own-listing purchases.

critical_bugs.issue: Shipping fee input field (data-testid='listing-shipping-input') is completely missing from rendered HTML
critical_bugs.details: Code exists in /app/frontend/src/pages/CreateListing.jsx lines 320-355 with proper data-testid attributes, but field is not rendered in browser. Tested after cache clear, frontend restart, and file touch - still not appearing.
critical_bugs.impact: Wave 3 shipping fee feature is completely non-functional on frontend. Users cannot set shipping fees when creating listings.
critical_bugs.evidence: HTML source does not contain 'listing-shipping-input', 'Shipping fee', or '🌱 Prefer local pickup' text

critical_bugs.issue: Wave 3 transactions page features missing - no kind tabs, no status filter chips
critical_bugs.details: Transactions page redirects to login or shows old version without Wave 3 features (All/Buying/Selling/Swaps/Donations tabs, multi-select status chips)
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot filter transactions by kind or status as specified in Wave 3 requirements

integration_issues.issue: Frontend code in source files does not match rendered HTML - possible build cache or deployment issue

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/listings with shipping_fee_cents=750 returns 201 with correct field
✅ Backend: PATCH /api/v1/listings/{id} with shipping_fee_cents=1200 updates correctly
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/transactions/donate with shipping_fee_cents=0 correctly rejects own-donation
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/transactions/donate with shipping_fee_cents=800 correctly rejects own-donation
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/transactions/donate/{tx_id}/capture with invalid tx_id returns 404
✅ Backend: Listing CRUD operations work correctly with shipping_fee_cents field
✅ Backend: Donate flow validation works (own-donation rejection)

success_percentage.backend: 91% (10/11 tests passed - 1 test requires second user account)
success_percentage.frontend: 0% (0/6 Wave 3 features visible - critical deployment issue)

items.description: The shipping fee field code exists in CreateListing.jsx (lines 320-355) but is NOT rendered in the browser HTML. Same issue with Transactions.jsx Wave 3 features. This suggests a build/deployment problem.
items.required_action: Investigate why frontend code changes are not being reflected in the rendered HTML. Possible causes: (1) Production build being served instead of dev build, (2) Build cache issue not resolved by clearing node_modules/.cache, (3) Different version of files being deployed, (4) Webpack/React build configuration issue.
items.verification: After fix, verify that [data-testid='listing-shipping-input'] appears in browser HTML on /market/create page

items.description: Transactions page does not show kind tabs (All/Buying/Selling/Swaps/Donations) or status filter chips as implemented in Transactions.jsx
items.required_action: Same root cause as CreateListing issue - frontend deployment problem. Fix the build/deployment issue to enable Wave 3 transactions features.
items.verification: After fix, verify that [data-testid='transactions-kind-tabs'] and [data-testid='transactions-status-filters'] appear on /transactions page

detailed_findings.backend_status: Backend Wave 3 implementation is solid. All shipping_fee_cents CRUD operations work correctly. Donate flow validation works. PayPal integration endpoints are accessible. The only untested scenario is the full buy flow with shipping fees, which requires a second user account or foreign listing.
detailed_findings.frontend_status: CRITICAL ISSUE: Frontend Wave 3 code exists in source files but is NOT being rendered. This is a deployment/build problem, not a code problem. The CreateListing.jsx file contains the shipping field implementation (verified by grep and file viewing), but the rendered HTML does not include it. Same issue affects Transactions.jsx Wave 3 features.
detailed_findings.deployment_investigation: Attempted fixes: (1) Cleared node_modules/.cache, (2) Restarted frontend service multiple times, (3) Touched source files to force recompilation, (4) Cleared browser cache and storage. None resolved the issue. Webpack shows 'compiled with 23 warnings' but no errors. The dev server is running (confirmed by ps aux). This suggests either: (a) wrong files being served, (b) React component not being imported/used, or (c) conditional rendering hiding the fields.
detailed_findings.next_steps_for_main_agent: Main agent should: (1) Verify the correct CreateListing.jsx is being imported in App.js, (2) Check for any conditional rendering logic that might hide the shipping field, (3) Verify no environment variables are hiding Wave 3 features, (4) Consider a full rebuild from scratch, (5) Check if there's a production build being served instead of dev build.
